user.title: Add Location Receiver Device
user.description: Configure a new GPS tracker device.

data_description.device_type: OsmAnd/Traccar uses GET or POST requests. CarStatsViewer uses POST JSON.

osmand_mode.title: OsmAnd Webhook Mode
osmand_mode.description:
**Individual webhook** — a dedicated URL for this device only.

**Global webhook** — one shared URL for all OsmAnd/Traccar devices. Devices are identified by the `device_id` they send. The global webhook URL is configured once for the entire integration and reused by every device that chooses this mode.

data_description.bound_device_id: Required for Global mode. Must match the `id` / `device_id` sent by your tracker.

global_webhook.title: Configure Global OsmAnd Webhook
global_webhook.description:
**This webhook will be shared by all devices using Global mode.**

By default a cryptographically secure random ID is generated — strongly recommended. You may define a custom ID if your client requires a fixed URL.

⚠️ **A short or predictable ID reduces security.** The webhook ID is the only secret protecting your endpoint.

Custom IDs must be at least {min_length} characters — letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

data_description.webhook_manual: Leave unchecked to generate a secure random ID (recommended).
data_description.custom_webhook_id: Only applies when manual mode is enabled above.

global_webhook_existing.title: Global OsmAnd Webhook — Already Configured
global_webhook_existing.description:
A global OsmAnd webhook is already active for this integration:

```
{webhook_url}
```
ID: `{global_webhook_id}`

This device will share that webhook URL. Click **Submit** to confirm.

webhook.title: Webhook ID
webhook.description:
By default a cryptographically secure random ID is generated — strongly recommended.

You may define a custom ID if your client requires a fixed URL.

⚠️ **A short or predictable ID reduces security.** The webhook ID is the only secret protecting your endpoint.

Custom IDs must be at least {min_length} characters — letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

data_description.webhook_manual: Leave unchecked to generate a secure random ID (recommended).
data_description.custom_webhook_id: Only applies when manual mode is enabled above.

error.name_exists: A device with this name already exists.
error.bound_device_id_required: A device ID is required when using Global webhook mode.
error.webhook_too_short: Webhook ID must be at least {min_length} characters.
error.webhook_invalid_chars: Webhook ID may only contain letters (A–Z, a–z), numbers, hyphens and underscores.
error.webhook_already_used: This webhook ID is already in use by another device.

init.title: Reconfigure Location Receiver
init.description:
**{webhook_label}**

```
{webhook_url}
```
ID: `{active_webhook_id}` ({webhook_type})

Device type: {device_type} | OsmAnd mode: {osmand_mode} | Bound device ID: {bound_device_id}

Select what you want to change:

global_webhook.title: Change Global OsmAnd Webhook
global_webhook.description:
⚠️ **This change affects all devices using the global webhook.**

**Current URL:**
```
{current_webhook_url}
```
Current ID: `{current_webhook_id}`

Generating a new ID will invalidate the current URL — you must update the server URL in all tracker apps.

Custom IDs must be at least {min_length} characters — letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

data_description.webhook_manual: Leave unchecked to generate a new secure random ID.
data_description.custom_webhook_id: Only applies when manual mode is enabled above.

osmand_mode.title: Change OsmAnd Mode / Bound Device
osmand_mode.description:
**Active webhook URL:**
```
{webhook_url}
```
ID: `{active_webhook_id}`

Update the OsmAnd mode and/or the device ID bound to this entry.

data_description.bound_device_id: Required for Global mode. Must match the `id` / `device_id` sent by your tracker.

webhook.title: Change Webhook ID
webhook.description:
**Current webhook URL:**
```
{current_webhook_url}
```
Current ID: `{current_webhook_id}`

Generating a new ID will invalidate the current URL — you must update the server URL in your tracker app.

Custom IDs must be at least {min_length} characters — letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.

⚠️ **Manual IDs are less secure than auto-generated ones.**

data_description.webhook_manual: Leave unchecked to generate a new secure random ID.
data_description.custom_webhook_id: Only applies when manual mode is enabled above.

error.bound_device_id_required: A device ID is required when using Global webhook mode.
error.webhook_too_short: Webhook ID must be at least {min_length} characters.
error.webhook_invalid_chars: Webhook ID may only contain letters (A–Z, a–z), numbers, hyphens and underscores.
error.webhook_already_used: This webhook ID is already in use by another device.
